content.text:
It's graduation time for ipfs-deploy 🎓🎉

3 months after releasing my first npm package, it has gone farther than I'd ever expect:

- 🏆 Show HN stayed on front page for 15h and peaked at #5
- ⭐ 493 github stars
- ☁️ Recommended by Cloudflare's official docs

Last & best tho⋮
